new_findings.pattern: I seem to be experiencing issues accessing my account
new_findings.rationale: This formal phrasing about account access issues does not appear in the real batch.

new_findings.pattern: I swear I didn't do anything wrong
new_findings.rationale: This informal expression of frustration and innocence is not found in the real samples.

new_findings.pattern: Like, I swear the pic was way diff
new_findings.rationale: The casual language and structure of this complaint about a product mismatch is unique to the synthetic batch.
